title: apocolyptic weapons
description: adds weapons that are more modern fit for a zombie apocalypse  so far it just adds spiked bat and normal bat and mutiple kinds of knifes.
body:
this mod adds:
katana
kitchen knife
cleaver
wooden bat
spiked bat
pocket knife
all of them ecept for the bats have variants for all material types(netherite, diamond, iron, gold, stone and wood)

(want proof that i can use the knife textures from grand birb then go to https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/combat-knives-swords/comment/10730365/#reply_10730365 and https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/pocket-knives-6721962/comment/10730364/#reply_10730364) works with better combat btw
